rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible feature names and concrete bounds for input assumptions and output guarantees.
generic_rules: Formulate range constraints using boolean helper declarations for clarity and reuse.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for defining boolean helper variables in AGREE contracts.
Wrap AGREE annex blocks in `annex agree { ... };` syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
